channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Damage to roundabout at junction of Bath Road, 30th April
item.description:
Roundabout at junction of Bath Road, Leckhampton Road and Shurdington Road has been hit by a vehicle. Damage to brickwork, potentially unsafe, and wrap round "Bath Road" sign
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A46, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 30th April
item.description:
Cw kerbing X1 dropper needs resetting Stats required Give and take (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Japanese Knotweed spreading onto the public verge, 30th April
item.description:
There is a large stand of Japanese Knotweed that is spreading onto the public verge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Orchard Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not really potholes more like pieces of the road missing, 30th April
item.description:
Can’t really miss it, road needs resurfacing not patching
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 30th April
item.description:
CW Pothole 1200mm x 900mm x 62mm Temporary Closure 15min db Outside Pheasant Cottage (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Soddy unprofessional repair work!!!!, 30th April
item.description:
The double roundabout on the Longford lane and old Cheltenham road has been repaired recently. The repair has actually made the road worse than it was this is a disgrace and the firm responsible should be made to come back and fix their SHODDY AWFUL WORK!!!!!! any one concerned with this repair should be embarrassed with themselves plain and simple
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Cheltenham Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Severe surface defects,, 29th April
item.description:
Large area of road surface failure with loose aggregates, potholes forming, and failed patch repairs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-6, Clevedon Square, Rowanfield, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two potholes in road, 29th April
item.description:
In road between Elkstone Court and Rose Cottage, Elkstone GL53 9PB
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elkstone, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are about 5 deep and growing potholes from the main road junction towards Field Close, 29th April
item.description:
Between Westerleigh X-roads and Field Close
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elkstone, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole and significant surface erosion next to recent patch repairs, 29th April
item.description:
There are multiple potholes on the road, the road surface has significantly eroded.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26-31, Clevedon Square, Rowanfield, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement damage, 29th April
item.description:
There was a report of pavement damage here, you have just come out and put a barrier around it and removed the problem as fixed it’s still there
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bassett Close, Winchcombe, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
